videoSnippet.title: The King Of Catalan || Dubov vs Caruana || Chess.com Open (2026)
videoSnippet.description:

Dubov, Daniil (2697) - Caruana, Fabiano (2789)
2026 Chess.com Open (Chess.com) [06] 2026.03.23
E06 Catalan, closed, 5.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.g3 Be7 5.Bg2 O-O 6.O-O dxc4 7.Qc2 a6 8.a4 Bd7 9.Qxc4 Bc6 10.Bg5 Nbd7 11.Nc3 h6 12.Bxf6 Nxf6 13.Rfd1 a5 14.Ne5 Bxg2 15.Kxg2 c6 16.e3 Bd6 17.Qe2 Qe7 18.Nc4 Bb4 19.Qf3 Nd7 20.h4 Rfd8 21.Ne4 b5 22.Na3 Rab8 23.Nc2 bxa4 24.Rxa4 Nb6 25.Nxb4 axb4 26.Ra6 e5 27.Rc1 Rdc8 28.Qf5 Nd7 29.Ra7 Rd8 30.Rxc6 exd4 31.exd4 Rb5 32.Nc5
